surveys.comment: over priced and trying to reach someone regarding your non working service sucks big time i would never refer xfinity to anyone especially since m going to leave soon

service is terrible ! keeps cutting off and resetting all the time . very disappointing and frustrating!  we have premium and are diamond members and have been with you for  many years but are  now looking for others options !
great interaction. quick answers to my questions
caleb was extremely patient with this older woman, and fully explained all details so they were clear to me. he is a trainee who was very personable and smiled a lot.

we were helped by an extremely good team from the moment we started. they had anwsers for all of our questions. the whole experience reminded me of customer service when it mattered and both of the people made us xfinity customers for life. thank you for staffing your stores with such people. your phone service almost made us switch to direct t.v instead of adding our phone lines with you. that area is impossible to deal with and rude beyond description.
being overcharged
the service rep was kind and patient.  i was frustrated to go without cable and internet for 5 days, including over a holiday weekend. my problem couldn't be corrected over the phone, i felt heard.
i was in and out in a matter of minutes. the process was quick, easy, and the individual helping me was able to do so efficiently.
she was very polite, easy transaction!!

i was only there to return the basic cable box., because i just purchased a new tv and didn’t realize that i didn’t need it . and again it was alex who waited on me and again he was very kind and professional.
jamil was courteous and helpful. took care of equipment return and answered my question.
the customer service representative,  mr jamal gave me excellent service

the clerk said it would be a 10-15 minute wait, but it ended up taking 40 minutes. honestly, that was more of a customer issue than an xfinity employee issue.i was at the store because my modem died after (i think) about three years of use. the replacement  modem i picked up at your store friday morning was dead saturday morning. i don’t know why
excellent service from terrica and in person visit to pick up equipment, on a holiday no less
the sales associate was attentive, and quick assisting. i did not have to wait and they answered all of my questions and concerns

no… once again i have wasted my time. i normally do not fill out surveys for this very reason. i have worked in customer service management for years and the information i sent, i felt someone would want to know. i am not rewording or resending.
alex took care of me extremely well

i want to comment on the last two visits because i didn't have time to comment and they go together. on the first visit,  mark, cash and anaf were extremely helpful in making our transition to xfinity's phone service relatively smooth. they were very welcoming and informative and helped us through the long and painful process of switching phones. mark, cash and anaf spent a lot of time with us to get our new phones in good working order. we came back a few days later, because samsung was not going to be a good fit for three phones. we came back and mark had bad news. the motorola phones were out of stock,  but mark ordered the phones so we can resolve that issue. we're looking forward to getting the new motorolas and continuing our phone service with xfinity.
fast service and close to my house
both jordan and hunter were wonderful. they answered all my questions and really went beyond what was required. thanks, guys!
my store visit was wonderful.  theman that helped me was friendly and prompt.  i was greeted warmly.  i didn't have to wait. he knew what i needed and i was out the door quickly.
the person was professional when taking care of me.

just because the customer service in the store was good. i was happy to find a store somewhat close to me as i do not like dealing with customer service over the phone woyh xfinity at all. it is always a horrible experience.
customer next to me arguing with staff. person helping me had problems logging into his ipad at the human verify screen. wasted 5 min trying to log in
the guy who helped us at the store was awesome
tried to add channels on line your app sucks went into the store and they were very helpful and quick
xfinity has the best service
because the representative call me back and inform that i can take the modem and get another
that’s the rating i was asked to give.
noah and ty very helpful store reps
your employee was very nice and helpful!!! he gets a 12 out of 10
read my prior email

the the customer service representative i talked on the phone with was quick and extremely helpful. the person working at the store was also extremely helpful. i had a bad experience with at&t when i talked with them over the phone and had multiple issues with them.
my router won’t work, the soonest a technician can get to me is next week, and the hotspot i was offered in the meantime wasn’t compatible with my phone. so i have no wifi for a week and limited data
the rep was very nice very informative answered all my questions overall a very nice person

jordan was immediately helpful. we have been comcast customers since 1997 and have had very little issues since. we now have moved to a town that xfiniy doesn't serve. my husband called and canceled a few days before the move, however jordan at the store found that it had not been canceled!!! he then canceled our service and we returned our equipment. he made the cancelation and return very easy.
prompt, courteous and able to help me with what i needed
the person that helped me was informative and very pleasant to deal with. he solved my problem very quickly on 3 july.
very efficient service at the xfinity store in glenview, il.
very customer service friendly and was busy but got taken care of very quickly.
superior costumer service.
phone purchase and  transfer took 3hrs and 10 mins
service was awesome & friendly
fixed all my problems
colton was very patient in hearing my issues and kind to provide remedy to my situation. showcasing great customer service
frank was super helpful!  he was attentive, knew exactly what to do to resolve our issue, and assisted excellently with everything we asked!  we had the best experience with him.
best customer service from the store in greenville tn daniel was great
